title: containerfile.containerignore not found if containerfile path not relative to root of context
body:
The buggy line:
https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/fb473e4d538f693f8b3ee3f8f2ed93a2abed5064/pkg/parse/parse.go#L1380C4-L1380C60

Example:
```
root
├── myprojdir
└── containerfiles
    ├── Containerfile.myproj.dockerignore
    └── Containerfile.myproj
```

```sh
# ignore file not found
podman build myprojdir -f ./containerfiles/Containerfile.myproj -t myorg/myproj
# hack: ignore file found
podman build myprojdir -f $(realpath ./containerfiles/Containerfile.myproj) -t myorg/myproj
```

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
